arts.ttl: Why Arsenal & Man Utd should AVOID signing Gyokeres or Osimhen in January
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen and the aforementioned Gyokeres have both been heavily linked with a mid-season move to Old Trafford, however both Arsenal and Man Utd may be wise to wait until the summer window before signing a new centre forward. The pair have notched a combined five Premier League goals so far this season, and Ruben Amorim is determined to purchase a more consistent goalscorer as he looks to spark Man Utd into life during the second-half of the season.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri told what he must keep doing at Arsenal as Mikel Arteta waits for injury update
arts.sum: Speaking to Arsenal's official website, Partey said: “He’s a very good player and we know the qualities he has. Having opened his account against Nottingham Forest in November, Nwaneri became only the sixth player to score more than one Premier League goal before his 18th birthday after Wayne Rooney, Michael Owen, Danny Cadamarteri, James Milner and Federico Macheda.

arts.ttl: Newcastle without key players for first leg of Arsenal Carabao Cup semi-final showdown
arts.sum: Magpies dealing with mix of injuries and suspensions for trip to north London

arts.ttl: Howe says cup win can convince Newcastle stars to stay
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has said winning the Carabao Cup can help Newcastle United keep their top talent at the club. Newcastle take on Arsenal in the first leg of their semi-final tie on Tuesday night, as the Magpies look to take a step towards Wembley. arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Brendan Rodgers breaks silence on Kieran Tierney rumours after Celtic 'talks'
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers remains tight-lipped on rumours that Arsenal's Kieran Tierney could rejoin the club in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Howe provides Newcastle injury update on Gordon and Botman ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has provided an injury update on Anthony Gordon and Sven Botman ahead of Newcastle’s Carabao Cup semi-final against Arsenal. Gordon was substituted during the 2-1 win at Tottenham Hotspur on Saturday, having earlier sustained a nasty cut to the nose. arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 34-year-old campaigner in line to replace Bruno Guimaraes at Arsenal
arts.sum: He said: "Of course, we have big games and we're doing well in the big games at the moment, so I think naturally that brings a good feeling to what we're doing. When asked who could replace Bruno, with Trippier and Burn able to do the job in recent times when the Brazilian was not on the field, Howe said: "It is a tight call.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker expects huge change to VAR as he predicts Arsenal appeal
arts.sum: Gary Lineker suggested that an appeal system must be introduced as part of VAR following the awarding of a controversial penalty for Brighton in their 1-1 draw with Arsenal this past weekend

arts.ttl: Howe has silverware in sights ahead of Arsenal semi-final
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has said there is ‘a lot at stake’ for Newcastle ahead of the club’s Carabao Cup semi-final against Arsenal. Newcastle travel to North London to face Arsenal in the first leg of their semi-final tie on Tuesday evening.
